title: Vanilla Animated Food
description: A resource pack that adds animations to eating food without any mods using the new resource pack features introduced in 24w45a!
body:
![Vanilla Animated Food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hBQiPHa1/images/568dc0f890cc4ea04658d554bf2e121f1f474cc0.png) **Vanilla Animated Food** uses the power of the new resource pack features introduced in 24w45a / 1.21.4 to add animations to eating entirely without Mods! This pack animates **every** single item you can eat or drink in vanilla Minecraft. And we also plan to add support for modded food items in the future! Head over to the **Gallery** section to see more images of this pack! # Installation Vanilla Animated Food is compatible with newer Minecraft versions, starting with 1.21.4 pre-release 1 and can be installed through the Modrinth app, or manually added to your resource pack folder. # Video
Watch on YouTube
# Support / Credits [](https://membercat.com) This resource pack is part of **Membercat Studios** by KasaiSora and has been created by: - **bug_finder**: Artist - **dec123**: Artist *(all textures until up to v1.0.0)* - **codingcat**: Resource pack configuration To report any issues, receive support or tell us your feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://dc.kasai.gg).
